articles.author: Hafsa Adil and Reuters
articles.title: Captain of Iran’s women’s team withdraws Australia asylum bid: State media - Yahoo
articles.description: Zahra Ghanbari is fifth football player to withdraw her request after seven squad members sought asylum in Australia.
articles.content: The captain of the Iranian womens football team has withdrawn her bid for asylum in Australia, Irans state media says, making her the fifth member of the delegation to change her mind after her teams… [+4051 chars]
